name: Unity MCP
description: AI-powered Unity Editor automation via MCP - manage GameObjects, scripts, materials, scenes, prefabs, and more

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Ping Unity to verify connectivity

tools.name: echo
tools.description: Echo parameters back for testing

tools.name: manage_scene
tools.description: Manage Unity scenes: list, load, save, create

tools.name: manage_gameobject
tools.description: CRUD on GameObjects: create, delete, modify, transform

tools.name: find_gameobjects
tools.description: Find GameObjects by name, tag, layer, path, component

tools.name: get_project_info
tools.description: Get project info: scenes, tags, layers, assets

tools.name: manage_material
tools.description: Create and modify materials: color, texture, shader properties

tools.name: manage_shader
tools.description: Work with shaders: list, get properties, keywords

tools.name: manage_texture
tools.description: Create and modify textures with patterns and gradients

tools.name: manage_asset
tools.description: CRUD on assets: create, rename, delete, move, copy, find

tools.name: manage_script
tools.description: Create and modify C# scripts: create, rename, delete

tools.name: manage_components
tools.description: Add, remove, and configure GameObject components

tools.name: create_script
tools.description: Create C# scripts from templates with method stubs

tools.name: script_apply_edits
tools.description: Apply code edits to C# scripts: replace, insert, add using

tools.name: validate_script
tools.description: Validate C# script syntax and compilation

tools.name: manage_editor
tools.description: Control Unity Editor: play, pause, stop, selection, focus

tools.name: refresh_unity
tools.description: Refresh Unity asset database and recompile scripts

tools.name: execute_menu_item
tools.description: Execute Unity Editor menu items by path

tools.name: read_console
tools.description: Read Unity Editor console: logs, warnings, errors

tools.name: manage_prefabs
tools.description: Create, instantiate, unpack, apply, and revert prefabs

tools.name: manage_ui
tools.description: Manage UI Toolkit: UXML, USS, UIDocument components

tools.name: manage_vfx
tools.description: Manage VFX and particle systems

tools.name: manage_animation
tools.description: Manage animations: controllers, states, transitions, clips

tools.name: manage_camera
tools.description: Manage cameras: create, set properties, Cinemachine

tools.name: manage_packages
tools.description: Install, remove, and manage Unity packages
